name: Refried Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and rinse the black beans, then transfer them to a bowl.
2. Add the diced onion, minced garlic, chopped cilantro, olive oil, and cumin to the bowl with the beans.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a microwave-safe dish.
5. Microwave on high for two minutes, stirring halfway through cooking time.
6. Serve with baked tortilla chips.
